name: String type coercion bug in shopping cart
prompt: My shopping cart receipt shows 'Widget: 19.9919.99' instead of 'Widget: 39.98'. The formatReceipt function seems to concatenate prices as strings. How do I fix this?
expected_root_cause: Price values arrive as strings from form input. The + operator performs string concatenation instead of numeric addition
secondary_bug_description: quantity can also be a string, affecting other calculations
